creator: doon@inoc.net
text:
Just a quick patch to Update the version of mod_sql_tds that the ftp/proftpd includes to Version 4.12.   Version 4.12 of mod_sql_tds fixes the bug with pr_log_pri, so files/extra-patch-contrib-mod_sql_tds.c  is no longer needed.

Fix: See Attached Patch File. 

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: N/A
